title: End Effector Orientation
description:
End Effector Orientation

End Effector Orientation

When using SCARA type robots, end effector orientation refers to the orientation of the elbow joint.  There are 2 possible end effector orientations Lefty and Righty.  When the elbow is configured like a human's left arm we call this left hand orientation.  When the elbow is configured like a human's right arm we call this right hand orientation.
